command: node atm.mjs tasks scope add --task TASK-AAO-0035 --actor codex-gpt-5.4-mini --add "tests/cli-fixtures/help-snapshots/**,scripts/validate-cli.ts" --reason "TASK-AAO-0035 command help contract changes are validated through validate:cli help snapshots and per-command help assertions; updating the shared help surface without the snapshot/validator lane would leave the task unable to prove drift-safe behavior." --json
